title: musa × paradisiaca subsp. normalis
intro: Musa × paradisiaca subsp. normalis, also known as the edible banana, is a variety of banana plant that belongs to the family Musaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to help soothe digestive issues and treat wounds. The health benefits of Musa × paradisiaca subsp. normalis include its ability to support healthy digestion, boost the immune system, and provide essential vitamins and minerals. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or juice, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
